Technical Support Analysis Dashboard

Power BI dashboard for the ONYX Data Challenge — technical support ticket analysis with interactive exploration.

Watch walkthrough Interactive dashboard

Participation in the ONYX Data Challenge (May 2024). Built a Technical Support Analysis dashboard in Power BI covering ticket volumes, resolution patterns, and support team performance with interactive filtering and cross-highlighting for exploratory analysis.
